error_signature: data not displaying in input multiselect
title: Data not displaying in input multiselect
symptom: The input multiselect shows the initial value but does not display the list of options. The options are bound to a variable or a database but only the index is shown instead of the text.
applies_when: Data is bound to a page variable or Xano database
not_this_if: Data is correctly formatted as a list of objects with label and value fields
root_cause: The input multiselect requires a specific format for the options, which should be a list of objects containing both label and value fields. If the data is not structured this way, it will not display correctly.
fix_steps: Format the data as a list of objects, e.g., [{"Status": "Active"}, {"Status": "Pending"}, {"Status": "Deactivated"}]
Set the 'Status' field as both the label and value in the input multiselect settings.
agent_instruction: Ensure the data for the input multiselect is formatted as a list of objects with appropriate label and value fields.
